meta.positioning: Publicly disclosed trades, baskets and market theses — mapped against AI sector heat, valuation pressure and bubble risk.
meta.methodology: Signals are based on public filings, public reports, fund letters or human research. Santro turns them into structured market context. Not financial advice.
rules: No signal without source_quality and status.
13F-based signals always carry the delay warning.
Interpretation is labeled santro_interpretation, never attributed to the investor.
Holdings are never asserted as current beyond the latest dated source.

signals.title: Michael Burry AI Short Watch
signals.source_notes: Q3 2025 Form 13F, filed 2025-11-03. 13Fs disclose put option notionals but not strike or expiry. No 13F filed since; Scion has reportedly wound down operations — current positioning unknown.
signals.delay_warning: Public filings may be delayed and may not reflect current holdings.
signals.thesis_summary: The Q3 2025 13F disclosed put options against NVDA and PLTR — a defined-risk position against AI/GPU valuation. Not a prediction; a filed, dated position.
signals.santro_interpretation: Santro tracks the names the filing touched: chip-sector heat and crowding, NVDA/PLTR moves, and the AI bubble-risk gauge. The signal is historical context, not a live book.

signals.title: Aschenbrenner AI Infrastructure Basket
signals.source_notes: Q1 2026 Form 13F (SEC EDGAR, CIK 2045724) plus reputable-media coverage (Fortune) and the fund's public thesis essays. NBIS stake separately reported via 13G (~5.6%).
signals.delay_warning: Public filings may be delayed and may not reflect current holdings.
signals.thesis_summary: A concentrated public book behind one thesis: AI capability scaling is bottlenecked by physical infrastructure — GPU compute, electricity, and the fab/memory chain.
signals.santro_interpretation: Santro maps the disclosed names against the Powering AI theme, data-center power heat, and chip-equipment rotation. Position sizes are as-of the filing period only.
